title: Grading System
description: Assign a letter grade based on a score using switch or else if.
problemStatement:
Build a grading utility! Given a score (integer) between 0 and 100, output the grade:

- 90-100: `"A"` 
- 80-89: `"B"` 
- 70-79: `"C"` 
- Below 70: `"D"` 

**Hint:** Divide the score by 10 (e.g., `score/10`) to use a `switch` statement easily, or use `else if` chains.
hints: If using `switch`, remember to `break` after each case.
The default case can handle scores below 70.
